specs.title: should load the game page successfully
should display all UI elements
should initialize with score of 0
should render game canvas with correct context
should respond to arrow key presses
should not have console errors during key presses
should have game state exposed for testing
should track game state changes
should update score when food is eaten
should detect wall collisions
should detect self collision
should show game-over overlay on collision
should display final score in game-over overlay
should restart game when restart button clicked
should be able to play again after restart
should render canvas in all browsers
should handle keyboard input consistently
should maintain consistent FPS across platforms
should match initial game state screenshot
